title: The composable AI thesis
abstract: Tired of struggling with your thesis? The Composable AI Thesis is here to help! Think of it as a super-smart tutor that not only helps organize your thoughts and refine arguments but also generates paragraphs or even the entire first draft. Say goodbye to writer's block—give it a try now!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也在头疼写毕业论文？《可组合AI论文》来帮忙！它就像个全能导师，不仅能帮你整理思路、提炼观点，还能生成段落甚至整篇初稿。再也不用担心论文写到一半就卡壳了，赶紧试试吧！
